name: Dhansak
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the legumes and soak them for an hour.
2. In a large pot, combine water and legumes. Bring to a boil.
3. Cut the vegetables into bite-sized pieces and add them to the legumes. Cook for 10 minutes.
4. Heat ghee in a separate pot. Sauté onion and garlic until golden. Stir in chili, turmeric, and garam masala. Mix thoroughly.
5. Transfer the legumes and vegetables to the pot with the ghee mixture. Stir well. Add salt and cook for another 20 minutes until everything is tender.
6. Add lemon juice and cilantro. Serve hot.
